name: plush-toy-erp-web
description: Frontend for Plush Toy ERP built with Vite and React

scripts.build:all: pnpm gen:error-codes && pnpm build:desktop && pnpm build:mobile:boss && pnpm build:mobile:merchandiser && pnpm build:mobile:purchasing && pnpm build:mobile:production && pnpm build:mobile:warehouse && pnpm build:mobile:finance && pnpm build:mobile:pmc && pnpm build:mobile:quality
scripts.test: node --test src/common/auth/auth.test.mjs src/common/consts/errorCodes.test.mjs src/common/utils/errorMessage.test.mjs src/erp/config/seedData.test.mjs src/erp/config/menuPermissions.test.mjs src/erp/config/printTemplates.test.mjs src/erp/config/docs.test.mjs src/erp/config/workflowStatus.test.mjs src/erp/config/businessRecordDefinitions.test.mjs src/erp/data/processingContractTemplate.test.mjs src/erp/qa/fieldLinkageCatalog.test.mjs src/erp/pages/WorkflowTaskDebugPage.test.mjs src/erp/utils/businessChainDebug.test.mjs src/erp/utils/businessModuleNavigation.test.mjs src/erp/utils/businessRecordForm.test.mjs src/erp/utils/businessRecordItemLayout.test.mjs src/erp/utils/businessRecordPrintDraft.test.mjs src/erp/utils/finishedGoodsFlow.test.mjs src/erp/utils/linkedNavigation.test.mjs src/erp/utils/materialPurchaseContractEditor.test.mjs src/erp/utils/mobileRolePermissions.test.mjs src/erp/utils/mobileTaskQueries.test.mjs src/erp/utils/mobileTaskView.test.mjs src/erp/utils/moduleRecordSort.test.mjs src/erp/utils/moduleTableColumns.test.mjs src/erp/utils/orderApprovalFlow.test.mjs src/erp/utils/outsourceReturnFlow.test.mjs src/erp/utils/payableReconciliationFlow.test.mjs src/erp/utils/purchaseInboundFlow.test.mjs src/erp/utils/printPageMargin.test.mjs src/erp/utils/processingContractEditor.test.mjs src/erp/utils/printPdf.test.mjs src/erp/utils/printWorkspace.test.mjs src/erp/utils/qaWorkbenchReports.test.mjs src/erp/utils/shipmentFinanceFlow.test.mjs src/erp/utils/usePrintWorkspaceWindowSnapshot.test.mjs src/erp/utils/workflowDashboardStats.test.mjs
